name: Red Lobster Garlic Cheese Rolls
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit. Mix the ingredients.
Drop by large spoonfuls onto a greased baking sheet. Bake for 8-10 minutes. Brush with melted butter mixed with garlic powder, parsley flakes, and Italian seasoning (amounts will vary depending on batch size, but a little goes a long way). Serve hot.
